security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; font-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'

bundle.longDescription: MobileCheck scans your own phone over USB from this computer — read-only, Android and iOS — shows a plain-language report, and keeps an encrypted history so you can see whether your security is improving. Nothing is sent anywhere unless you explicitly export and share it.
